nasb.text: Behold, My servant will prosper, He will be high and lifted up and greatly exalted.

esv.text: Behold, my servant shall act wisely; he shall be high and lifted up, and shall be exalted.

cnv.text: 看哪！我的僕人必行事亨通， 他必受尊崇，被高舉，成為至高。

ccb.text: 看啊，我的仆人必成功， 受到拥戴、仰慕和尊崇。

csbs.text: “看哪，我的仆人必行事通达， 他必高升、被高举、极为崇高！
